AI Assistant
For Your Business

Instant Chat
Experience

feature3.title:
All Channels,
One Dashboard

feature4.title:
Live Performance
Metrics

ecommerce.title: AI for E-commerce
ecommerce.desc: 24/7 automated support for order tracking, stock info and returns

hero.title: AI Assistant for E-commerce
hero.subtitle: Provide your customers 24/7 order tracking, stock info and return support. Cut your support costs by up to 60%.

useCase1.title: Order Tracking
useCase1.desc: Customers can instantly check their order status

useCase3.title: Return Processing
useCase3.desc: Easy return request creation and tracking

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Automate your e-commerce customer support in 3 steps

step1.title: Customer Query
step1.desc: A customer asks about an order, shipping or return — whether via WhatsApp, web chat or email.

step2.title: AI Analysis & Action
step2.desc: Telyx understands the query, fetches real data from your e-commerce platform, and generates the right response.

step3.title: Instant Resolution
step3.desc: The customer gets an accurate answer in seconds. When needed, a seamless handoff to your live support team.

integrations.title: E-commerce Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Seamless integration with popular e-commerce platforms

highlights.title: E-commerce Highlights
highlights.subtitle: Features that keep you one step ahead of the competition

item1.title: Smart Product Recommendations
item1.desc: Personalized product suggestions based on customer history and preferences.

item2.title: Auto Stock Alerts
item2.desc: Automatically notify interested customers when products are back in stock.

item3.title: Customer Verification
item3.desc: Verify customer identity before sharing order details or starting return actions.

cta.title: Provide 24/7 Support to Your E-commerce Customers
cta.subtitle: Increase customer satisfaction with an AI assistant integrated with ikas, Shopify and other platforms.

exampleFlow.step1: Order status request -> fetch from ERP/Shopify/ikas -> respond with up-to-date status.
exampleFlow.step2: Return request -> classify issue -> open return form and add tags.
exampleFlow.step3: Cargo tracking -> generate tracking link -> share and update automatically.

chatDemo.msg2: I found your order. For verification, could you please provide the last 4 digits of your phone number?
chatDemo.msg4: Verified successfully. Order #ORD-23423 has been shipped. Your tracking number is YK-832402.

tab1.title: Order Tracking
tab1.contentDesc: Your customers can instantly check order status by order number. AI pulls live data from your ERP and shipping systems.

tab2.title: Returns & Exchange
tab2.contentDesc: Auto-classify return requests, generate forms, and keep customers informed at every step.

tab3.title: Product Advisory
tab3.contentDesc: Offer product recommendations, stock checks and size/color guidance based on customer preferences.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Automate your restaurant communication in 3 steps

step1.title: Customer Request
step1.desc: A customer wants to make a reservation, check the menu, or ask about business hours.

step2.title: Smart Routing
step2.desc: Telyx checks availability via calendar integration, presents menu info, and prepares the right response.

step3.title: Quick Result
step3.desc: Reservation confirmed, menu info shared, or special requests recorded.

highlights.subtitle: Features that help you deliver an unforgettable guest experience

item1.title: Google Calendar Integration
item1.desc: Check table availability in real-time with calendar integration.

item2.title: Allergen Information
item2.desc: Automatically share allergen details from your menu with customers.

item3.title: No-Show Protection
item3.desc: Reduce your no-show rate with automatic reminder messages.

cta.title: Automate Your Restaurant Reservations
cta.subtitle: Seamless reservation management with Google Calendar integration. Lighten your staff workload.

exampleFlow.step1: Reservation request -> check availability from calendar -> offer slots instantly.
exampleFlow.step2: Menu question -> return allergen/portion details -> suggest suitable items.
exampleFlow.step3: Order inquiry -> confirm status from POS/integration -> inform customer.

chatDemo.msg1: Hi, can I make a reservation for tonight?
chatDemo.msg2: Of course. How many guests and what time would you prefer?
chatDemo.msg4: A table for 4 at 8 PM is available. May I have your name and phone number?

tab1.title: Reservations
tab1.contentDesc: Real-time availability with calendar integration. Customers can book tables 24/7 via WhatsApp or web.

tab2.title: Menu Guide

tab3.title: Feedback
tab3.contentDesc: Send automatic post-meal satisfaction surveys. Route negative feedback to managers instantly.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Automate your salon appointments in 3 steps

step1.title: Appointment Request
step1.desc: A customer wants to book an appointment via WhatsApp, web chat or phone.

step2.title: Smart Matching
step2.desc: Telyx automatically matches the right staff, service duration and available time slots.

step3.title: Confirm & Remind
step3.desc: Appointment confirmation is sent, and automatic reminders are triggered before the appointment.

highlights.title: Salon Highlights
highlights.subtitle: Features that help you deliver a professional customer experience

item1.title: Staff-Based Calendar
item1.desc: Schedule appointments with individual staff availability — no double-bookings.

item2.title: Auto Reminders
item2.desc: Send automatic WhatsApp reminders 24 hours and 1 hour before appointments.

item3.title: Service Catalog
item3.desc: Instantly share all your services, durations and prices with customers.

cta.title: Simplify Your Salon Appointments
cta.subtitle: Automatic appointment management with calendar integration. Cut your no-show rate in half.

exampleFlow.step1: Appointment request -> match staff + service duration -> suggest best slot.
exampleFlow.step2: Pre-visit question -> share service details and preparation guidance.
exampleFlow.step3: No-show risk -> send reminder and confirm attendance.

chatDemo.msg1: Can I book a haircut for tomorrow?
chatDemo.msg2: Sure. Tomorrow afternoon Sarah is available at 2 PM and Emily at 3:30 PM. Which do you prefer?
chatDemo.msg4: Your appointment is confirmed. Haircut with Sarah tomorrow at 2 PM. You'll get a reminder 1 hour before.

tab1.title: Appointments
tab1.contentDesc: Auto-match staff availability, service duration and customer preferences. 24/7 appointment booking.

tab2.title: Reminders
tab2.contentDesc: Reduce no-shows by up to 50% with pre-appointment WhatsApp reminders.

tab3.title: Service Catalog
tab3.contentDesc: Share all your services, durations, prices and sample photos with customers.

support.title: AI for Customer Support
support.desc: Smart support for general queries and FAQ answering

hero.title: AI Assistant for Customer Support
hero.subtitle: Automatically answer customer questions 24/7, reduce your support team's workload by up to 80%.

useCase1.title: FAQ Answering
useCase1.desc: Instant answers to frequently asked questions

useCase3.title: 24/7 Service
useCase3.desc: Uninterrupted support even outside business hours

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Transform your customer support in 3 steps

step1.title: Issue Detection
step1.desc: A customer sends a support request via any channel. AI automatically identifies the intent and priority.

step2.title: Smart Response
step2.desc: A grounded response is generated from your knowledge base. Tickets are auto-created for complex issues.

step3.title: Resolution or Handoff
step3.desc: Simple questions are resolved instantly. Complex issues are handed off to live agents with a summary.

highlights.title: Support Highlights
highlights.subtitle: Advanced features that boost customer satisfaction

item1.title: Knowledge Base Integration
item1.desc: Upload your existing documents and let AI generate grounded answers.

item2.title: Smart Escalation
item2.desc: AI hands off unresolved issues to the right agent with full context summary.

item3.title: Performance Dashboard
item3.desc: Monitor resolution rates, customer satisfaction and agent performance from one dashboard.

cta.title: Strengthen Your Customer Support
cta.subtitle: Increase customer satisfaction with AI, reduce your support costs.

exampleFlow.step1: Incoming issue -> detect intent and priority from message.
exampleFlow.step2: Knowledge lookup -> provide grounded answer with references.
exampleFlow.step3: If unresolved -> create ticket and handoff with conversation summary.

chatDemo.msg1: I can't reset my password, it keeps giving an error.
chatDemo.msg2: I can help with that. Which email address is your account registered with?
chatDemo.msg4: A password reset link has been sent to info@mycompany.com. The link is valid for 15 minutes.

tab1.title: Resolution
tab1.contentDesc: AI automatically identifies intent and priority from customer messages, generating grounded answers from your knowledge base.

tab2.title: Escalation
tab2.contentDesc: AI routes unresolved issues to the right department and agent with full context summary.

tab3.title: Analytics
tab3.contentDesc: Monitor resolution rates, customer satisfaction, average response times and trend analysis from one dashboard.

hero.title: Bringing AI to Every Business
hero.subtitle: Headquartered in Los Angeles with Turkish founders, Telyx combines 15+ years of business experience with cutting-edge AI to transform how businesses communicate with their customers.

story.title: Our Story
story.originContent: Since 2010, we've built expertise across software development, e-commerce, and digital marketing. We experienced firsthand that customer service is the biggest bottleneck for every business — repetitive questions, 24/7 support pressure, rising costs. In 2023, we combined this experience with AI to build Telyx.
story.laContent: Telyx was founded in Los Angeles, at the heart of the AI and technology ecosystem. With Turkish founders, we bring global technology to Turkey and the world. We started in Turkey to prove ourselves in its dynamic SMB ecosystem, with plans to expand to global markets.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: We build technology with a human-centered approach.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: To enable every business, regardless of size, to provide 24/7 professional, consistent, and personalized customer service.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.desc: To build a world where customer communication is fully transformed by AI, enabling every business to deliver enterprise-grade service.

culture.title: Our Culture
culture.desc: We're a small but passionate team. Every line of code, every integration, and every improvement starts from our customers' real needs.

team.title: Our Team
team.subtitle: A passionate, results-driven team bringing together diverse expertise.

nurettin.title: Founder & CEO
nurettin.desc: Leads product vision, business strategy, and partnerships. Shaped every stage of Telyx from founding to its current state.

mirac.title: CTO
mirac.desc: Manages all technical infrastructure and engineering processes. Backend architecture, AI pipeline, and system security are under his responsibility.

davut.title: Turkey Operations Advisor
davut.desc: Guides Turkey market growth strategy with academic experience and extensive business network. Plays a key role in sales and customer acquisition.

eyup.title: Software Developer
eyup.desc: Takes active role in frontend and backend development. Works on improving user experience and shipping new features.

ramazan.title: Software Developer
ramazan.desc: Works on integration development and testing processes. Contributes to improving system reliability and performance.

merve.title: Marketing & Content
merve.desc: Manages digital marketing strategies, content creation, and brand communications. Brings Telyx's story to the right audience.

cta.title: Be Part of Our Story
cta.subtitle: Discover the power of AI-powered customer service. Try it free, experience the difference.

companyInfo.title: Company Information
companyInfo.description: Telyx is a SaaS platform that automates customer communication processes across phone, chat, WhatsApp, and email channels using AI. Founded in 2023 in Los Angeles.

hero.title: Frequently Asked Questions
hero.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Telyx.ai

faq.a1: Telyx.ai is a platform that enables businesses to automatically respond to customer requests from phone, WhatsApp, chat, and email channels using artificial intelligence.
faq.a2: We support phone (AI voice response), WhatsApp Business, web chat widget, and email channels.
faq.a3: Basic setup can be completed within 10 minutes. You can start using your assistant immediately after creating it.
faq.q5: Does it integrate with my e-commerce site?
faq.a5: Yes, we integrate with ikas, Ticimax, Ideasoft, and Shopify. Your customers can check their order status.
faq.a6: We operate on a monthly subscription model. Visit our pricing page for details.
faq.a7: We are currently in early access. You can get priority access by signing up for the waitlist.
faq.a8: Yes, all data is stored encrypted and processed in compliance with GDPR.
faq.a9: You can reach us at info@telyx.ai.

contact.title: Have Another Question?
contact.text: Send us an email and we'll get back to you shortly.

help.quickStartSubtitle: Set up your AI assistant in 4 steps and start serving your customers.
help.faqSubtitle: The most common questions about Telyx and their answers.
help.topicsSubtitle: Explore the topics you want to learn more about.

apiDocs.title: API Documentation
apiDocs.comingSoon: Our API documentation will be published soon.

dataCollected.title: Data Collected
dataCollected.content:
When using our services, we collect the following data:
• Identity information (name, email address)
• Contact information (phone number, address)
• Usage data (page views, clicks)
• Device information (IP address, browser type)
• AI assistant conversation records (phone, WhatsApp, chat, email)

dataUsage.title: Purpose of Data Usage
dataUsage.content:
Collected data is used for the following purposes:
• Service delivery and improvement
• Providing customer support
• Communication and notifications
• Fulfilling legal obligations

dataStorage.title: Data Storage
dataStorage.content:
Your data:
• Is stored encrypted on secure servers
• Is kept only for the necessary duration
• Is protected with industry-standard security measures
• AI conversation records are automatically deleted after 30 days

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Sharing
thirdParty.content:
Your data may be shared in the following cases:
• Service providers (payment processors, infrastructure providers)
• Legal requirements and court orders
• Other third parties with your consent

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.content:
We use the following cookies on our website:
• Session cookies (login status)
• Analytics cookies (site usage)
• Preference cookies (language selection)

userRights.title: User Rights (GDPR)
userRights.content:
Under GDPR, you have the following rights:
• Right to be informed about your data
• Right to request correction of inaccurate data
• Right to request deletion of your data
• Right to object to data processing
• Right to data portability

contact.title: Contact
contact.content:
For questions about our privacy policy:
Email: info@telyx.ai

serviceDefinition.title: Service Definition
serviceDefinition.content: Telyx.ai is a SaaS (Software as a Service) product that provides businesses with an AI-powered customer service platform. The platform automatically responds to customer requests from phone, WhatsApp, chat, and email channels.

accountCreation.title: Account Creation
accountCreation.content:
To use our service:
• You must provide accurate and current information
• You are responsible for account security
• You must keep your password confidential
• You must report unauthorized access immediately

acceptableUse.title: Acceptable Use
acceptableUse.content:
When using our service:
• You must use it for legal purposes
• Spam or abuse is prohibited
• You must not violate others' rights
• You must not attempt to bypass security measures

paymentTerms.title: Payment Terms
paymentTerms.content:
Payment terms:
• Monthly or annual subscription options are available
• Payments are automatically renewed
• Cancellation takes effect from the next billing period
• Our refund policy is valid within 14 days

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.content:
• The platform and all content belong to Telyx.ai
• Users retain rights to content they upload
• Platform license is for personal/commercial use
• Reverse engineering is prohibited

liability.title: Liability Limitations
liability.content:
Telyx.ai:
• Does not guarantee against service interruptions
• Is not responsible for indirect damages
• Maximum liability is limited to subscription fees paid
• Is not responsible for third-party integrations

termination.title: Termination
termination.content:
Account closure:
• You can close your account at any time
• Your account may be suspended for violations
• Your data is deleted within 30 days after closure
• Necessary data may be retained for legal obligations

changes.title: Changes
changes.content:
These terms of service:
• May be updated with prior notice
• Important changes are notified via email
• Continued use means acceptance

contact.title: Contact
contact.content:
For questions about terms of service:
Email: info@telyx.ai

security.heroSubtitle: We protect your business and customer data with the highest security standards. Work confidently with our KVKK and GDPR compliant infrastructure.
security.dataSecuritySubtitle: Your data is protected with industry-leading security protocols.
security.complianceSubtitle: Full compliance with Turkish and European data protection regulations.
security.aiSecuritySubtitle: Our AI assistant is protected with multiple security layers.
security.opsSubtitle: Our systems are monitored and protected 24/7.
security.ctaSubtitle: Our security team is ready to answer your questions and explain security solutions tailored to your business.

blog.heroSubtitle: The latest content on AI and customer service
blog.ctaSubtitle: Follow the latest developments in AI, customer service, and e-commerce. Join our early access list to get exclusive content.
blog.postCtaSubtitle: Take your business to the next level with an AI-powered customer service platform. Apply for early access now.

marketingFaq.title: Frequently asked questions
marketingFaq.subtitle: Clear answers before you go live.

integrationTime.question: How long does integration take?
integrationTime.answer: Standard setup is usually completed in 15-30 minutes. Special systems and custom mapping can take 1-3 business days.

requiredData.question: Which data is required to start?
requiredData.answer: At minimum: business profile, core FAQ/process content, and at least one channel integration. Optional order/CRM data improves answer quality.

aiToHuman.question: When does AI ask for human support?
aiToHuman.answer: In low-confidence, policy-sensitive, or exception scenarios, the assistant can hand off to an agent or request explicit approval.

kvkk.question: What is your KVKK approach?
kvkk.answer: We follow data minimization, role-based access, auditability, and retention controls. Final legal assessment should be done with your compliance counsel.

pricingOverage.question: How does overage pricing work?
pricingOverage.answer: When included plan minutes are exhausted, additional usage is billed with the defined overage rate. Channel-specific overage details are shown on pricing.
